idea_summary: A mobile app that connects university students who want to find compatible study partners based on subject, schedule, and learning style.
target_users: Undergraduate students struggling to study alone
Postgraduate students looking for accountability partners
International students trying to integrate socially through academics
problem_assumption: Students find it hard to discover study partners who match their subject, availability, and study pace, leading to isolation and poor academic performance.
solution_assumption: A matching platform where students create a short profile (courses, free slots, study style) and get matched with compatible partners nearby or online.
business_model: Freemium — basic matching is free, premium adds filters, video rooms, and progress tracking for a monthly subscription.
keywords_for_problem_discovery: study partner apps student engagement problems
university students studying alone mental health
peer learning platform challenges higher education
EdTech peer matching app pain points
